assignment: Close the remaining executable proof gap in the SDK deactivation contract without changing its accepted placement or lifecycle semantics.
required_checks: Add a saved case with at least two rejected attempt-settlement promises.
Assert every snapshotted attempt is awaited before deactivation rejects.
Assert the result is AggregateError and its errors list contains every original failure in deterministic snapshot order.
Keep one-error propagation, normal cancelled settlement, ten existing cases, six activation behaviors, zero commits, and zero durable status/version mutation intact.
Create checkpoint.v3.json rather than overwriting v2, with fresh resolvable hashes and complete executable wall fields.
Update the replay to validate the new case and checkpoint shape. Do not self-accept.
forbidden: Product code, tests, docs, manifests, git history, PR state, external services, frame, tree, or another worker's artifacts
A Lite primitive, ownership change, hidden commit, wall weakening, or treating the current breach as accepted
required_outputs: workers/dkr-1-cleanup-v3/progress.jsonl via the absolute OKRA store helper worker-report command
terminal_condition: Finish when all prior cases plus deterministic multiple-error aggregation replay and only independent validation plus the current baseline resolution remain blocking.
